name: Floor walk sheet
description: Timed observation sheet for live coaching, escalation checks, guest-flow pressure, and the moments where a manager should intervene rather than watch passively.
source_ref: core-v2: management presence should be guided by real risk signals, not vague attentiveness
usage_moment: Use during critical service windows while the manager is moving the floor deliberately.
expected_output: A short record of observed pressure points, coaching actions, escalation events, and follow-up needs.
